    <script
        src="https://public-assets.envato-static.com/assets/gtm_measurements-40b0a0f82bafab0a0bb77fc35fe1da0650288300b85126c95b4676bcff6e4584.js"
        nonce="TFNQUvYHwdi8uHoMheRs/Q=="></script>

    <script nonce="TFNQUvYHwdi8uHoMheRs/Q==">
            //<![CDATA[
            (function () {
                function normalizeAttributeValue(value) {
                    if (value === undefined || value === null) return undefined

                    var normalizedValue

                    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
                        normalizedValue = normalizedValue || value
                            .map(normalizeAttributeValue)
                            .filter(Boolean)
                            .join(', ')
                    }

                    normalizedValue = normalizedValue || value
                        .toString()
                        .toLowerCase()
                        .trim()
                        .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
                        .replace(/&#39;/g, "'")
                        .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')

                    if (normalizedValue === '') return undefined
                    return normalizedValue
                }

                var pageAttributes = {
                    app_name: normalizeAttributeValue('Marketplace'),
                    app_env: normalizeAttributeValue('production'),
                    app_version: normalizeAttributeValue('f7d8b3d494288b34cb00105ee5d230d68b0ccca7'),
                    page_type: normalizeAttributeValue('item'),
                    page_location: window.location.href,
                    page_title: document.title,
                    page_referrer: document.referrer,
                    ga_param: normalizeAttributeValue(''),
                    event_attributes: null,
                    user_attributes: {
                        user_id: normalizeAttributeValue(''),
                        market_user_id: normalizeAttributeValue(''),
                    }
                }
                dataLayer.push(pageAttributes)

                dataLayer.push({
                    event: 'analytics_ready',
                    event_attributes: {
                        event_type: 'user',
                        custom_timestamp: Date.now()
                    }
                })
            })();

        //]]>
    </script>

.header-mini1{
    background:
        radial-gradient(circle at left,rgba(255,30,30,.40),transparent 30%),
        radial-gradient(circle at right,rgba(239,203,27,.25),transparent 35%),
        linear-gradient(
            90deg,
            #090909 0%,
            #221212 30%,
            #990000 60%,
            #ff3333 82%,
            #efcb1b 100%
        ); /* Gradasi mecha fire yang agresif */

    height:35px;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    line-height:35px;
    font-size:18px;

    border-left:10px solid #ff3333; /* Border kiri merah gaming tebal */

    color:#ffffff;

    text-shadow:
        0 0 10px rgba(255,50,50,.85),
        0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.9);

    background-size:220% 100%;

    animation:shine 6s linear infinite;

    box-shadow:
        inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05),
        0 0 18px rgba(255,30,30,.35);
}

.scrolling-wrapper{
    display:flex;
    width:max-content;
    position:absolute;
    animation:scrollInfinite 12s linear infinite;
}

.scrolling-text{
    white-space:nowrap;
    padding-right:50px;
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:900;
    color:#ffffff;
    letter-spacing:.8px;

    text-shadow:
        0 0 8px #ff3333,
        0 0 18px rgba(239,203,27,.75), /* Kombinasi glow merah emas */
        0 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.9);

    opacity:0;

    animation:
        fadeInMove 2s ease-out forwards,
        bounce 1.8s ease-in-out infinite alternate;

    text-transform:uppercase;
}

    background:
        radial-gradient(circle at center,
        rgba(255,30,30,.20),
        transparent 35%),
        linear-gradient(
            180deg,
            #161616 0%,
            #090909 100%
        ); /* Background hitam arang */

    position:relative;
    text-align:center;

    box-shadow:
        0 4px 22px rgba(255,30,30,.30),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05);
}

    background:
        linear-gradient(
            180deg,
            #efcb1b 0%,
            #cc9900 100%
        ) !important; /* Tab terpilih berwarna Emas Mewah */

    text-shadow:none;

        0 0 16px rgba(239,203,27,.55);
}

/* ANIMATION */

@keyframes shine{
    0%{
        background-position:220% 0;
    }
    100%{
        background-position:-220% 0;
    }
}

@keyframes fadeInMove{
    0%{
        opacity:0;
        transform:translateX(50px);
    }
    100%{
        opacity:1;
        transform:translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes scrollInfinite{
    0%{
        transform:translateX(0);
    }
    100%{
        transform:translateX(-50%);
    }
}

@keyframes bounce{
    0%{
        transform:translateY(0);
    }
    50%{
        transform:translateY(-2px);
    }
    100%{
        transform:translateY(0);
    }
}

                                                            <span class="is-visually-hidden">5.00 stars</span>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </span><span class="item-navigation-reviews-comments">888</span></a></li>
                                    <li><a class="js-item-navigation-comments t-link -decoration-none" href="https://baseg.nsk.ru/"><span>Toto Macau</span><span
                                                class="item-navigation-reviews-comments">888</span></a></li>
                                    <li><a class="js-item-navigation-support t-link -decoration-none" href="https://baseg.nsk.ru/">Keluaran Macau</a>
                                    </li>
                                </ul>


                            </div>

  <header class="rb-combo-header">
    <div class="rb-badge">
      <span>Top</span>
      Info
    </div>

    <h2 class="rb-combo-title">
      LANDAKTOTO : Buruan Merapat! Daftar Situs Toto Macau Dengan Keluaran Macau Hari Ini
    </h2>

    <div class="rb-rating">
      <div class="rb-stars">★★★★☆</div>
      <strong>4.7/5</strong>
      <span>Diperbarui: 05/07/2026</span>
    </div>
  </header>

<!-- FAQ DI ATAS -->
<div class="rb-faq-section">
  <div class="rb-section-title">
    <span>FAQ</span>
    <h3>Pertanyaan Seputar LANDAKTOTO & Keluaran Macau Hari Ini</h3>
  </div>

  <div class="rb-faq-list">
    <details class="rb-faq-item" open>
      <summary>Apa itu LANDAKTOTO?</summary>
      <p>
        <strong style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #efcb1b;">LANDAKTOTO</strong> adalah platform resmi yang menyediakan Daftar Situs Toto Macau terpercaya sekaligus pusat informasi hasil undian tercepat yang aman di Indonesia.
      </p>
    </details>

    <details class="rb-faq-item">
      <summary>Apakah Keluaran Macau Hari Ini di situs ini dijamin valid?</summary>
      <p>
        Ya, seluruh hasil angka <strong style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #efcb1b;">Keluaran Macau Hari Ini</strong> yang ditampilkan dijamin 100% valid dan sah karena diambil secara langsung dari sistem pemutaran live draw pusat tanpa manipulasi.
      </p>
    </details>

    <details class="rb-faq-item">
      <summary>Kapan pembaruan hasil undian dilakukan di LANDAKTOTO?</summary>
      <p>
        Proses pembaruan angka di <strong style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #efcb1b;">LANDAKTOTO</strong> berjalan secara real-time dan otomatis mengikuti setiap jadwal putaran resmi yang berlaku dari pusat.
      </p>
    </details>

    <details class="rb-faq-item">
      <summary>Bagaimana cara melakukan pendaftaran di Daftar Situs Toto Macau ini?</summary>
      <p>
        Anda cukup mengakses link alternatif resmi <strong style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #efcb1b;">LANDAKTOTO</strong>, menekan tombol pendaftaran, dan mengisi formulir yang tersedia dengan data yang valid untuk mulai bertaruh dengan nyaman.
      </p>
    </details>

    <details class="rb-faq-item">
      <summary>Apakah ada jaminan pembayaran atas kemenangan taruhan di LANDAKTOTO?</summary>
      <p>
        Tentu saja. Sebagai platform yang direkomendasikan dalam <strong style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #efcb1b;">Daftar Situs Toto Macau</strong> resmi, LANDAKTOTO berkomitmen penuh untuk membayar seluruh kemenangan para pemain secara instan tanpa potongan.
      </p>
    </details>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REVIEW DI BAWAH -->
<div class="rb-review-section">
  <div class="rb-section-title">
    <span>Review</span>
    <h3>Ulasan Pengunjung LANDAKTOTO</h3>
  </div>

  <div class="rb-review-grid">
    <article class="rb-review-card">

      </p>
    </article>

      </p>
    </article>

      </p>
    </article>
  </div>

</section>

  width:100%;
  max-width:800px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
  padding:18px;

    radial-gradient(circle at top left,rgba(255,30,30,.25),transparent 35%),

    0 12px 35px rgba(255,30,30,.25),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  color:#fff;
}

  grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;

}

/* REVIEW */

.rb-review-section{
  padding-top:16px;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
}

  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:14px;
}

  position:relative;
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1c1c1c 0%,#0f0f0f 100%);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,30,30,.35);
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,30,30,.15);
  overflow:hidden;
}

  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  top:0;
  left:14px;
  right:14px;
  height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      transparent,
      #efcb1b,
      #ff3333,
      #ffffff,
      transparent); /* Garis gradasi atas mecha */
  opacity:.9;
}

.rb-featured{
  border-color:rgba(255,30,30,.75);
  background:
      radial-gradient(circle at top,
      rgba(255,30,30,.20),
      transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(180deg,#2c1414 0%,#0f0f0f 100%);
}

.rb-review-top{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.rb-avatar{
  width:34px;
  height:34px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ff4d4d,#990000); /* Avatar merah gradasi */
  color:#fff;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  font-weight:900;
  box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,30,30,.45);
}

.rb-name{
  font-size:14px;
}

.rb-card-stars{
  font-size:12px;
  margin-top:2px;
  letter-spacing:.5px;
}

.rb-review-card p{
  margin:0;
  color:#ffffff;
  font-size:13.2px;
  line-height:1.58;
  text-align:left;
}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .rb-combo-header{
      grid-template-columns:1fr;
      gap:10px;
  }

  .rb-rating{
      text-align:left;
  }

  .rb-review-grid{
      grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }

  .rb-combo-title{
      font-size:16px;
  }
}

                                                            <p class="purchase-form__us-dollars-notice" style="text-align: justify;"> 
                                                                <a href="https://baseg.nsk.ru/" style="color: #efcb1b;font-weight: bold;">LANDAKTOTO</a> merupakan rekomendasi utama bagi para pemain yang sedang mencari Daftar Situs Toto Macau resmi dan terpercaya di Indonesia. Sebagai agen taruhan terpercaya, platform ini menyediakan sistem pendaftaran yang mudah, aman, dan cepat untuk memastikan kenyamanan Anda saat bermain. Tidak hanya menawarkan taruhan yang adil, situs ini juga dilengkapi dengan fasilitas permainan terlengkap, diskon pasaran terbesar, serta jaminan pembayaran kemenangan berapapun nominalnya tanpa potongan sama sekali.
                                                            </p> 

                                                            <p class="purchase-form__us-dollars-notice" style="text-align: justify;"> 
                                                                Selain menjadi tempat bertaruh yang aman, LANDAKTOTO juga menyajikan informasi <a href="https://baseg.nsk.ru/" style="color: #efcb1b;font-weight: bold;">Keluaran Macau Hari Ini</a> yang diperbarui secara live dan akurat langsung dari pusat. Fitur ini sengaja dihadirkan agar Anda tidak tertinggal hasil undian dari setiap periode putaran <a href="https://baseg.nsk.ru/" style="color: #efcb1b;font-weight: bold;">Toto Macau</a> yang berlangsung setiap harinya. Dengan data yang tersusun rapi dalam tabel result resmi, Anda dapat memanfaatkannya untuk meracik prediksi angka jitu berikutnya sekaligus memvalidasi kemenangan Anda secara instan hanya di LANDAKTOTO.
                                                            </p>

                                                            <br>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </form>
                                              </div>
                                          </div>

                                <script nonce="TFNQUvYHwdi8uHoMheRs/Q==">
                                    //<![CDATA[
                                    // HACK: Google Chrome always scroll the previous page's position on hitting Back button
                                    // This causes issue with responsive version in which unexpanded item description obscure
                                    // the scroll position and Chrome will jump to the outer border of bottom
                                    window.addEventListener('unload', function (e) { window.scrollTo(0, 0); });

                                    //]]>
                                </script>
                                
                            </div>

                        </div>
                    </div>
                 <br>

<style>
.footer-floating-tgl,
.footer-floating-tgl *{
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

.footer-floating-tgl{
  position:fixed;
  left:50%;
  bottom:18px;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:92%;
  max-width:1500px;
  display:flex;
  gap:12px;
  padding:15px;
  z-index:99999;

  /* Mecha Dark Fire Palette */
  background: #090909 !important;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.25), transparent 40%),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.15), transparent 40%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #161616 0%, #090909 100%) !important;

  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.65);
  border-radius: 22px;
  box-shadow:
    0 0 25px rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.25),
    0 0 50px rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.1),
    inset 0 0 18px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
}

.footer-floating-tgl::before,
.footer-floating-tgl::after{
  display:none !important;
  content:none !important;
}

.footer-btn-tgl{
  flex:1;
  min-width:0;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:14px 10px;
  border-radius:14px;
  text-decoration:none !important;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  font-size:14px;
  font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:.8px;
  color:#fff !important;
  background:#090909 !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.5);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1),
    0 0 14px rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.2);
  transition:.28s;
  animation:floatBtn 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.footer-btn-tgl::before{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  inset:-3px;
  /* Mecha Fire Flow Gradient */
  background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ff3333, #efcb1b, #ff3333, transparent);
  background-size:300%;
  filter:blur(8px);
  animation:borderMove 6s linear infinite;
  z-index:0;
}

.footer-btn-tgl::after{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  inset:2px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, #221212, #090909) !important;
  z-index:1;
}

.footer-btn-tgl span,
.footer-btn-tgl img{
  position:relative;
  z-index:2;
  text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.8);
}

.footer-btn-tgl img{
  width:18px;
  height:18px;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px #ff3333);
}

/* Tombol Daftar (Warna emas mencolok khas mecha skin) */
.footer-btn-tgl.daftar{
  color:#090909 !important;
}
.footer-btn-tgl.daftar::after{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, #efcb1b, #cc9900) !important;
}
.footer-btn-tgl.daftar span{
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* Tombol Chat / Livechat (Gradasi merah menyala) */
.footer-btn-tgl.chat::after{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg, #ff3333, #990000) !important;
}

.footer-btn-tgl:hover{
  transform:translateY(-5px) scale(1.03);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 20px rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.6),
    0 0 40px rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.4);
}

.footer-btn-tgl:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s}
.footer-btn-tgl:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s}
.footer-btn-tgl:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.6s}
.footer-btn-tgl:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.8s}

@keyframes floatBtn{
  0%{transform:translateY(0)}
  50%{transform:translateY(-5px)}
  100%{transform:translateY(0)}
}

@keyframes borderMove{
  0%{background-position:0}
  100%{background-position:300%}
}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .footer-floating-tgl{
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:8px;
    padding:10px;
  }
  .footer-btn-tgl{
    flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px);
    font-size:12px;
    padding:12px 8px;
  }
  .footer-btn-tgl img{
    width:15px;
    height:15px;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="footer-floating-tgl">
  <a href="https://baseg.landakenjoy.shop/" class="footer-btn-tgl promo" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">
    <img src="https://anak-cungkok.pages.dev/fotofoto/favill.png" alt="PROMO LANDAKTOTO">
    <span>PROMO</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://baseg.landakenjoy.shop/" class="footer-btn-tgl login" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">
    <img src="https://anak-cungkok.pages.dev/fotofoto/favill.png" alt="Login LANDAKTOTO">
    <span>LOGIN</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://baseg.landakenjoy.shop/" class="footer-btn-tgl daftar" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">
    <img src="https://anak-cungkok.pages.dev/fotofoto/favill.png" alt="Daftar LANDAKTOTO">
    <span>DAFTAR</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://baseg.landakenjoy.shop/" class="footer-btn-tgl link" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">
    <img src="https://anak-cungkok.pages.dev/fotofoto/favill.png" alt="WhatsApp LANDAKTOTO">
    <span>WHATSAPP</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://baseg.landakenjoy.shop/" class="footer-btn-tgl chat" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">
    <img src="https://anak-cungkok.pages.dev/fotofoto/favill.png" alt="Live Chat LANDAKTOTO">
    <span>LIVE CHAT</span>
  </a>
</div>
<!-- 1. STYLE CSS (TRANSMIT & BERADA DI DEPAN) -->
<style>
    #mechaFireCanvas {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100vw;
        height: 100vh;
        display: block;
        z-index: 9999 !important; 
        background: transparent !important; 
        pointer-events: none; 
    }
</style>

<!-- 2. TAG ELEMEN CANVAS -->
<canvas id="mechaFireCanvas"></canvas>

<!-- 3. SCRIPT JAVASCRIPT (HUJAN METEOR & BARA API ESPORTS) -->
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('mechaFireCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

function resizeCanvas() {
    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resizeCanvas();
window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);

// Palet warna bertema Gaming Esports: Merah Menyala, Emas, dan Putih Kontras
const colors = {
    rain: ['rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.75)', 'rgba(255, 77, 77, 0.65)', 'rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.6)'],
    splash: ['rgba(255, 30, 30, 0.9)', 'rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.85)', 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)'],
    spark: ['rgba(239, 203, 27, 0.85)', 'rgba(255, 100, 30, 0.75)', 'rgba(255, 230, 100, 0.8)']
};

const raindrops = [];
const splashes = [];
const sparks = [];

// ==========================================
// CLASS HUJAN ENERGI / METEOR MERAH
// ==========================================
class Raindrop {
    constructor() { this.reset(); }
    reset() {
        this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
        this.y = Math.random() * -canvas.height;
        this.length = Math.random() * 40 + 25;   // Efek laser energi panjang (25 - 65px)
        this.speed = Math.random() * 16 + 15;    // Jatuh sangat cepat & agresif
        this.weight = Math.random() * 2.0 + 1.2; // Garis laser lebih tebal agar kontras
        this.color = colors.rain[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.rain.length)];
    }
    update() {
        this.y += this.speed;
        this.x += 0.8; // Angin serong khas gaya cyber action
        if (this.y >= canvas.height - 10) {
            if (Math.random() > 0.15) splashes.push(new Splash(this.x, canvas.height - 10));
            this.reset();
        }
    }
    draw() {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
        ctx.lineWidth = this.weight;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.moveTo(this.x, this.y);
        ctx.lineTo(this.x + 3, this.y + this.length);
        ctx.stroke();
    }
}

// ==========================================
// CLASS PERCIKAN RIAK ENERGI
// ==========================================
class Splash {
    constructor(x, y) {
        this.x = x;
        this.y = y;
        this.radius = 1;
        this.maxRadius = Math.random() * 28 + 15;
        this.alpha = 0.95;
        this.speed = Math.random() * 2.0 + 1.5;
        this.color = colors.splash[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.splash.length)];
    }
    update() {
        this.radius += this.speed;
        this.alpha -= 0.07;
    }
    draw() {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.ellipse(this.x, this.y, this.radius, this.radius * 0.25, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.strokeStyle = this.color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.0; // Riak ledakan energi lebih tegas
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();
    }
}

// ==========================================
// CLASS BARA API MELAYANG (FLOATING SPARKS)
// ==========================================
class Spark {
    constructor() { this.reset(); }
    reset() {
        this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
        this.y = Math.random() * -canvas.height;
        this.size = Math.random() * 4 + 2; // Ukuran partikel bara
        this.speedY = Math.random() * 3.0 + 2.0;
        this.speedX = Math.random() * 3 - 1.5;
        this.alpha = Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5;
        this.color = colors.spark[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.spark.length)];
    }
    update() {
        this.y += this.speedY;
        this.x += this.speedX + 0.8;
        if (this.y > canvas.height) this.reset();
    }
    draw() {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
        ctx.beginPath();
        // Menggambar partikel kotak/diamond khas mecha digital
        ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
        ctx.fillRect(this.x, this.y, this.size, this.size);
        ctx.restore();
    }
}

// Kepadatan efek
const maxRaindrops = 220; 
const maxSparks = 25; 
for (let i = 0; i < maxRaindrops; i++) raindrops.push(new Raindrop());
for (let i = 0; i < maxSparks; i++) sparks.push(new Spark());

// ==========================================
// LOOPING ANIMASI UTAMA
// ==========================================
function animate() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    // Render Hujan Laser
    raindrops.forEach(drop => {
        drop.update();
        drop.draw();
    });

    // Render Riak Ledakan Energi
    for (let i = splashes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        splashes[i].update();
        splashes[i].draw();
        if (splashes[i].alpha <= 0) splashes.splice(i, 1);
    }

    // Render Bara Api Melayang
    sparks.forEach(spark => {
        spark.update();
        spark.draw();
    });

    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>

<style>
body {
    -webkit-user-select: none;
    -moz-user-select: none;
    -ms-user-select: none;
    user-select: none;
}
</style>

<script>
// Mematikan klik kanan
document.addEventListener("contextmenu", e => e.preventDefault());

// Mematikan fungsi copy/salin
document.addEventListener("copy", e => e.preventDefault());

// Mematikan shortcut keyboard pembuka source code (F12, Ctrl+U, dll)
document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
    const key = e.key.toLowerCase();
    
    if (
        // Mematikan F12
        e.key === "F12"  
        // Mematikan Ctrl + U (View Source), Ctrl + C, Ctrl + S, Ctrl + P
        (e.ctrlKey && ["c", "u", "s", "p"].includes(key))  
        // Mematikan Ctrl + Shift + I / J / C (Inspect Element)
        (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && ["i", "j", "c"].includes(key))
    ) {
        e.preventDefault();
        return false;
    }
});
</script>

<script defer src="https://static.cloudflareinsights.com/beacon.min.js/v4513226cdae34746b4dedf0b4dfa099e1781791509496" integrity="sha512-ZE9pZaUXND66v380QUtch/5sE9tPFh2zg45pR2PB0CVkCtOREv2AJKkSidISWkysEuQ0EH8faUU5du78bx87UQ==" data-cf-beacon='{"version":"2024.11.0","token":"fdfa6d867b8444eea504b9e4c0cae180","r":1,"server_timing":{"name":{"cfCacheStatus":true,"cfEdge":true,"cfExtPri":true,"cfL4":true,"cfOrigin":true,"cfSpeedBrain":true},"location_startswith":null}}' crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
</body>
